meaning: n.责任,义务,倾向,债务,负债,与assets相对
examples: The company cannot accept liability for any damage caused by natural disasters.
The company does not accept liability for fragile, valuable or perishable articles.
He was ordered to pay the company $500,000 on account pending a final assessment of his liability.
Researchers at NERA found the two factors combined explained 70% of the difference in liability costs.
This is the only true way to protect the organization for present and future liability.
